name: Pizza- Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bread flour, salt, vegetable oil, water, and dry yeast in the bread pan. Close the cover and place the yeast packet in the yeast holder. Select BASIC DOUGH mode. Press start. The machine will complete the basic dough cycle in 2 hours and 25 minutes.
2. Divide the dough into 4 equal portions. Roll each portion into a ball.
3. Place the balls on a lightly floured surface. Cover with plastic wrap and let rest for 20 minutes.
4. Roll out each ball into a flat circle.
5. Place the circles on a greased baking pan. Prick the surface with a fork.
6. Brush with 2 tablespoons pizza sauce. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the top. Garnish with your choice of ingredients.
7. Bake in an oven set to 500°F (260°C) for 12 to 15 minutes, or until cooked through and the dough is crisp and slightly brown.
